title: ZZip Product Concepts Limited

'''zZip Product Concepts Ltd.''' was a company specializing in the manufacture of luxury goods for the wealthy, including designer pharmaceuticals and compounds, luxury [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]], and [[Droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="HSCS" /> Vehicles that were considered to be sturdy and fashionable were the company's signature; occasionally, these vehicles were also hand-made and were specifically made for wealthy clients.<ref name="AEE">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20021017web|text=''Arms & Equipment Guide'' Extras!}}</ref> zZip was one of the original [[contributing sponsor]]s to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], but was upgraded to [[voting sponsor]].<ref name="HSCS" />

Subsidiaries of zZip included [[zZip Defense Concepts]], responsible for the manufacture of the [[K-222 Aero-Interceptor]], and [[zZip Motor Concepts]], which constructed [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] such as the [[Orbitblade-2000]].<ref name="HSCS" /> Other products included the [[X-X landspeeder]],<ref name="Poly170" /> the [[42-Aybock Ion]],<ref name="FoI" /> the [[Personality Series ChaumScanner 5]],<ref name="CRO" /> the [[PSG-8487 View Masker]], and the portable [[Refresher Booth]].<ref name="GFT" /> One of zZip's other subsidiaries, [[Larjh StarCorporation]], manufactured customized space [[Yacht/Legends|yachts]].<ref name="HSCS" />
